productName: Kelso Kandy - KK TERP+INF PR .8g (Single) - Blue Razzberry - .8g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Blue Razz, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a sweet, ripe berry flavor, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
